prompts.prompt: Our company manufactures a consumer smart-home IoT router sold in the EU. Does the Cyber Resilience Act apply, what product class are we in, and what conformity assessment route applies?

Run an Annex I gap assessment for our consumer IoT router against the CRA essential requirements. Current state: ships with default password 'admin'; no automatic update mechanism; telnet management port open by default; no vulnerability disclosure policy; support commitment is 2 years.
We discovered an actively exploited vulnerability in one of our products. What are our reporting obligations under the CRA — to whom, and by when?
Design an SBOM programme for our products to meet CRA requirements. What must the SBOM contain and how does it fit vulnerability handling?
We import and distribute connected devices manufactured in Asia into the EU. What are our obligations as importer/distributor under the CRA versus the manufacturer's obligations?
